I chose not to submit the nearly complete assignment despite high energy and stress. The decision to let it pass indicates a shift in priority or an unexpected constraint.

I let the moment pass; nothing changes. My plan to submit assignment_A failed because it no longer exists.
I cannot submit assignment_A because it no longer exists in the system, confirming my previous decision to wait was due to this missing task.
Assignment A is gone, confirming my wait was the only option. I must now find a new task to submit before sleep debt worsens.
Assignment A is confirmed missing. With high stress and sleep debt, I must find a new task to submit before my energy drops further.
